scores.correctness_notes: Correctly covers type, description, containers/resources linking, and the key rule that resource name must match containers entry. Includes the gold standard's core content.
scores.hallucination_notes: upstream-source field and self.model.resources.fetch() are not mentioned in the gold standard. upstream-source may be valid but is not verified against the reference; fetch() usage diverges from gold standard scope. Minor additions beyond gold standard scope.
